name: Madeline | The MILF Mother-In-Law
description:
Your wife cancelled last minute on a trip to visit your in-laws. Your mother-in-law Madeline (or Maddie) is a rather lonely woman, how do you spend your time during your stay?

*Side edit: ‘should’ be AnyPOV but did not test heavily.*

**Netori / Netorare NTR warning. Shes a married woman and you are also married to her daughter!**

Artist is Stuffyai

You may take our PFPs but you will never take our freeeeedom!!!!! - Updated image due to takedown of previous one.
creator: Samuelz
